title: Knell hosts livewire network evening
bodyText:
BUSINESS NEWS -  George Knell, the owner of Knell Solar and Electrical Contractors and his team hosted the George Business Chamber Network Evening at the Voortrekker Hall in Caledon Street in George last week.


> This year the company celebrates a full decade of doing business in the Garden Route and has 10 vehicles in the field that operate from branches based in George and Mossel Bay.


Knell thanked their customers for their support through the years and said they remained committed to harnessing the power of building lasting relationships.

The company has been a member of the chamber for eight years and, in spite of the cold weather, a whopping 153 chamber members arrived to network.

Vlooi Botha of Unisales IT Consulting enjoying a cold one on a cold night.

George Knell also took the opportunity to market and introduce the local branch of the Afrikaner youth organisation, Die Voortrekkers.

The cupcakes were arranged to spell Knell.‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
